description_long: This obelisk features a tall, cylindrical column with a square base and a sculpted, abstract form at the top resembling a stylized animal head or helmet. The column is smooth and metallic, with a subtle sheen, and is capped by a darker, rough-textured stone or concrete structure. The base is robust and blocky, providing stability, and is composed of stacked square layers. The top sculpture has angular facets and a hollowed section, giving it a modern, minimalist appearance. The overall color palette is dominated by shades of gray, with the column being lighter and the top sculpture a darker, stony hue. There are no visible inscriptions or decorative motifs, emphasizing a clean, utilitarian design.
description: A tall, cylindrical obelisk with a square base and a dark, angular sculpted top, featuring smooth metallic and rough stone textures.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full height of the column and the angular, helmet-like top sculpture with a visible hollow section.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the geometric facets of the top sculpture and the smooth, uninterrupted column beneath.
description_view_2: Opposite side view reveals the other profile of the top sculpture, emphasizing its asymmetrical, abstract form.
description_view_3: Rear view displays the back of the top sculpture, which appears more solid and less hollowed, with the column and base remaining consistent.
attribute_base_design: The base is a solid, square platform composed of stacked layers, likely made of concrete or stone, with a simple, unadorned design and a slightly raised plinth.
attribute_tip_design: The tip features an abstract, angular sculpture with a hollowed section, resembling a stylized animal head or helmet, finished in a rough, dark stone texture.
